mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM alert WHERE (message NOT LIKE 'ŠĘíŠőčňĹŐŔşŽ%' OR message IS NULL)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO alert (pig_id, area, type, risk, timestamp, message) VALUES (#{pigId}, #{area}, #{type}, #{risk}, #{timestamp}, #{message})
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM alert WHERE id IN
#{item}
